sections.paragraph:
Original: אהליבהּ אהליבה

Transliteration: 'ohŏlı̂ybâh 'ohŏlı̂ybâhh

Phonetic: o''-hol-ee-baw'

BDB Definition:

Aholibah = "woman of the tent" or " the tent is in her"
  1. (metaphorically) Jerusalem as adulterous wife of Jehovah

Origin: (similarly with H170) for 'Oholiybahh o''-hol-e-baw', from H168

TWOT entry: 32c

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
